title: jojofuny 60Pcs Bingo Game Cards Set with Unique Numbers for Family Fun and Intellectual Development - Perfect for Parties and Kids
features: Unique Number System: Each toyandona bingo card features distinct numbers, ensuring no duplicates and enhancing gameplay excitement for everyone involved
Engaging Family Fun: Designed for both kids and adults, these bingo cards foster intellectual development while providing hours of entertainment for family gatherings
Portable Size: Measuring approximately 15.5 x 10.5 cm, these bingo cards are conveniently sized for transport, making them ideal for games
Complete Set: This set includes 60 bingo cards, making it perfect for larger family gatherings or parties, ensuring endless fun and engagement
Versatile Usage: Suitable for various occasions, these bingo cards can be used for game night, community events, or educational purposes to enhance number recognition
description: Features Colour: white. Material: coated paper. Size: 15.5 x 10.5 x 0.1 cm / 6.10 x 4.13 x 0.04 inches. Package includes: 60 x bingo
